ddls:
CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the writer's account */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the writer */,
  "portfolio_url" TEXT /* URL to the writer's portfolio */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the writer registered on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the writer */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate charged by the writer */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred categories */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the writer (e.g., active, inactive, on vacation) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the writer's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of social media links */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the writer (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer who wrote the article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article's category */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "price_per_word" REAL /* Price per word charged by the writer */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the article */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 8/10) */,
  "value_score" TEXT /* Value score given by the client (e.g., 10/10) */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the article was last updated */,
  "draft" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is a draft */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., pending, published, rejected) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who commissioned the article */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date for draft articles */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date for published articles */,
  "revisions" INTEGER /* Number of revisions made to the article */,
  "last_revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the last revision */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of keywords for search optimization */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for SEO purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name or company name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "company" TEXT /* Name of the client's company */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the client registered on the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the client */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred categories */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Additional preferences for content (e.g., tone, style) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the client (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article purchased */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who purchased the article */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the article was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price paid for the article */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the article was delivered to the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_purchases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_purchases_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being reviewed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client giving feedback */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the client (e.g., 8/10) */,
  "value_score" TEXT /* Value score given by the client (e.g., 10/10) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the client */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Explanation for the rating given */,
  "value_score_reason" TEXT /* Explanation for the value score given */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_feedback_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_feedback_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writer_earnings" (
  "earnings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earnings entry */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer who earned the amount */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article that generated the earnings */,
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding purchase */,
  "earnings_amount" REAL /* Amount earned from the sale of the article */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the earnings were paid out */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., bank transfer, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "invoice_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the invoice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earnings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writer_earnings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writer_earnings_purchase_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_id") REFERENCES article_purchases ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writer_earnings_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writer_stats" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  "total_articles" INTEGER /* Total number of articles written by the writer */,
  "total_words_written" INTEGER /* Total number of words written by the writer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating received by the writer */,
  "total_earnings" REAL /* Total earnings of the writer */,
  "last_article_date" TEXT /* Date the last article was written by the writer */,
  "average_revisions" REAL /* Average number of revisions per article */,
  "average_completion_time" TEXT /* Average time taken to complete an article */,
  "total_drafts" INTEGER /* Total number of drafts written */,
  "total_revisions" INTEGER /* Total number of revisions made */,
  "highest_rating" REAL /* Highest rating received by the writer */,
  "lowest_rating" REAL /* Lowest rating received by the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (writer or client) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., writer, client, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
